pages.image_tooltip: Sporting an iconic thick and domed skull, Pachycephalosaurus furiously butts heads with each other, often leaving them stunned by the concussive force.

pages.feature_1.tooltip: Pachycephalosaurus uses powerful charges to ram attackers, and engage in head-butting contests with other individuals or nearby mobs
pages.feature_1.title: Way to Use Your Head!
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Pachycephalosaurus may get reckless and stun themselves by ramming headfirst into hard surfaces like blocks and §r§aShields§r§7
pages.feature_2.title: Concussive
